x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Applied by a bank staff member.

Comment:
Example: Adjustment credit entered by an operator.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Automatic Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Generated automatically by system rules.

Comment
Example: Monthly interest posting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-Time Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Real-Time Credit: Credited instantly at the time of event.

Comment:
Example: Immediate cashback.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Processed at scheduled intervals.

Comment:
Example: End-of-day reward points posting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transfer Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credited through transfer from another account or bank.

Comment:
Example: Incoming wire transfer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Provisional Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Temporary credit before final confirmation.

Comment:
Example: Check deposit pending clearance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Credit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credited only after conditions are met.

Comment:
Example: Bonus after reaching spending target.
